title.en: Ye Tian heard of this kind of thing for the fir...

content.en:
The Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor was silent for a while, and then he said: "Before, the Beifeng family offered the Tai'er Ruins Insect to me, and I rewarded him with a little resource. If you bring me the Tai Erjin worm, I can give you some Tai Erjin soil!"

"What's the use of the Taierjin soil?"

Ye Tian heard of this kind of thing for the first time, so he asked.

Tai'e cursed the Dragon Ancestor and said, "Tai'er Jin Land is very precious, you can't find it anywhere else, only I have it here." Taiergin soil has many uses, and can be used to grow various resources and treasures to accelerate growth. You can also refine a secret treasure that can resist curses, and you can also trade with some Origin Upper Realm Overlords who have cultivated the Curse Origin Ancestor Method, and they also need this thing. "

For a faction, the Taierjin soil is very important.

He felt that Ye Tian would definitely need too much Erjin soil.

"You can grow resource treasures!"

Ye Tian thought about it and agreed.

He didn't want to send several replicas to guard the place all the time, and he would have to face attacks from the Cursed Dragon from time to time.

So, in the end, you have to agree.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian knew from the mouth of the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor where there was the Tai'er Ruins Worm, and after signing the agreement, he left here.

After Ye Tian left, the Tai'er Cursed Dragon showed an angry look.

With so many descendants of its people killed, how could it not be angry!

However, he couldn't kill Ye Tian.

"Damn it, when I break through in the future, I will definitely kill you!" said the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor coldly.

......

Ye Tian also knew that the compromise of the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor was only temporary, and so was he.

This kind of Tai'er cursed dragon clan who can leave the land of swinging the sea at any time and has the preparation to attack the Stygian Mountain Domain, he also wants to kill it, but his current strength is still not good, and he must wait for his strength to be stronger.

Now, he is going to the Ruins of Reincarnation to collect the Tai'er Ruins Worm and complete the agreement with the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Ancestor.

Other than that.

His other replica body was ready to go to Yan Zu to find out what the Ten Thousand Clans Agreement was.

Soon.

He saw Yan Zu.

At this time, Yan Zu saw Ye Tian and showed a look of surprise.

Ye Tian didn't completely cover her breath, so she could sense the horror of Ye Tian's breath.

This strength is much stronger than in the past!

"Endless Lord, you broke through?"

Yan Zu asked in surprise.

"Yes, I broke through, in terms of realm, it's quite three awakenings!" Ye Tian said lightly.

"The realm is equivalent to three awakenings!!! Yan Zu knew that Ye Tian was taking the fourth path, when he had just broken through, it was comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened four times, and now it was equivalent to three awakenings, wouldn't his combat power be equivalent to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened six times?

This strength has far surpassed her!

She was extremely envious of Ye Tian at the moment, if she could also embark on the fourth path, how good it would be!

Soon, Ye Tian asked for the agreement of all races.

"Ten Thousand Clans Agreement!" Yan Zu was stunned for a moment, this word was too long ago, and it had been a long time since the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm had mentioned this.

"Lord of Endless, the Ten Thousand Races Agreement was an agreement designated by the Origin Ancestor at that time, and I was not born at that time. The Ten Thousand Races Agreement is said to be an agreement between some incomparably terrifying creatures of the Eternal Beyond Land, as well as a few creatures of the Ruins of Reincarnation, and a group of Origin Upper Overlords of the Eternal Beyond Land. After the signing of the agreement of all races, some creatures in the treasured lands of the Eternal Lands are not allowed to come out, but we cannot attack them. However, the years have been too long, and many Origin Upper Realm Overlords don't care about this agreement anymore. Of course, some of the creatures in the treasure land are indeed very powerful, and there are even existences comparable to the eight awakenings, and we will not take the initiative to provoke them. Yanzu explained.

"So that's the case!" Ye Tian understood.

Moreover, after talking with Yan Zu, I learned that some creatures in the treasure land could not come out, not because they were born like this, but because the origin ancestor modified the rules of those treasure lands, if there was no strength comparable to the source ancestor, it was almost impossible to change the rules.

Of course.

Not all of the treasures have changed the rules, and they still have to be made according to the agreement of all races, and some of them have no restrictions.

But on the whole, the land beyond Eternity is stable.

After learning the reason, Ye Tian also understood, and he didn't continue to dwell on this issue.

Subsequently.

He took his leave and headed for the Northern Frontier Domain.

The Beifeng family must have known about the situation in the land of the sea, but they didn't tell him, if they told him, the Heavenly Mountain Pavilion Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors would definitely not fall.

Therefore, this account must be counted on the head of the Beifeng family.

"I promise to protect the Beifeng family, if I do it directly against the Beifeng family, this is undoubtedly not good!"

Ye Tian was going to make a copy of the Tai'er Curse Dragon and let the Tai'er Curse Dragon attack the Beifeng family, and when the time came, he would slowly come and kill his Tai'er Ancestral Dragon copy body.

......

The North Striker family.

The Lord of Beitang has been waiting for information from the Stygian Mountain Domain, but no news has come.

"Could it be that the Ancestor is wrong, that group of Tai O curse dragons is actually very gentle, even if there are no Tai Doom Worms, they will not rush out?"

If that's the case, it's a pity!

Suddenly.

A terrifying and evil aura permeated.

Swish!

He shuttled out and saw a cursed dragon.

Seeing this scene, his pupils shrank sharply, and he felt extremely shocked.

"Tai'er Cursed Dragon, how did this creature come to the Beifeng Domain????"

He clearly remembered that the ancestor had said that the dragon could not leave the Underworld Mountain Domain!

That's a!

If the Tai'er Cursed Dragon could leave the Underworld Mountain Domain, he would definitely not dare to do so!

At this moment, he thought that the Underworld Mountain Domain could not be stopped, and that group of Tai'er Ancestral Dragons had escaped from the Underworld Mountain Domain!

"Run!"

He immediately beckoned to the other Origin Upper Realms and the other clansmen of the Beifeng Family, preparing to escape.

Because this Tai Curse Dragon is not an ordinary Tai Curse Dragon, but a Tai Curse Dragon comparable to the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, he is not an opponent.

Airplanes!!!

The power of the Tai'er Curse Dragon Curse spread, and the clansmen of the Beifeng family were wiped out.

Moreover, the cursed power turned into spears that pierced the bodies of one of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, killing them.

"No!"

The Lord of Beitang was extremely frightened when he saw that he was locked.

"Spare your life!"

However, his sparing was of no avail.

The cursed spear pierced through his body, shattering his life completely.

In the blink of an eye, all the high-level leaders of the Beifeng family were wiped out.

It was also at this time that Ye Tian was late, and killed the Tai'er Curse Dragon with one shot, 'saving' the rest of the Beifeng family, and also received the gratitude of the entire Beifeng family.

After all, the rest of the Beifeng family didn't know about the Lord of Beitang and their plans, and they simply thought that Ye Tian saved them.
